style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An allegorical four-headed sea serpent rising from stormy waters, each of its four heads distinct in character, faced by a single resolute figure standing on a ship's deck holding navigational instruments rather than a weapon. The four hyrdas are labelled 'Technical Debt', 'Cyber Risk', 'Growing Demand', 'Deficits'. Tense but composed.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An allegorical four-headed sea serpent rising from stormy waters, each of its four heads distinct in character, faced by a single resolute figure standing on a ship's deck holding navigational instruments rather than a weapon. The four hyrdas are labelled 'Technical Debt', 'Cyber Risk', 'Growing Demand', 'Deficits'. Tense but composed.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
